name: Adventure Sports and Entertainment
headline: A Premier Sporting Destination
announcement: Registration is now open for upcoming baseball and softball events.
about: Adventure Sports & Entertainment LLC was formed to provide a community resource for athletes. We partner with national training experts to offer teams and organizations the best training opportunities, then host weekend tournaments for national and regional teams that showcase their talent. As a premier destination, we offer great amenities at our park along with discounts to enjoy local attractions.
parking: Free on-site parking is available. Overflow parking is available near the dome. Do not park in the side lots to the right of the A fields.

facilityHighlights.title: All-Turf Facility
facilityHighlights.text: A clean, all-turf complex built for tournaments, showcases, rentals, practices, and game-day events.

facilityHighlights.title: Lighted Fields
facilityHighlights.text: Field lighting supports evening games, practices, tournaments, and private events.

facilityHighlights.title: Batting Cages
facilityHighlights.text: Cages are available for warmups, hitting practice, lessons, and team training.

facilityHighlights.title: Clubhouse Restaurant
facilityHighlights.text: Enjoy food, drinks, seating, and clubhouse space during your visit.

facilityHighlights.title: Covered Dugouts
facilityHighlights.text: Teams have covered dugouts and field amenities throughout the complex.

facilityHighlights.title: Observation Decks
facilityHighlights.text: Great viewing areas for families, coaches, and spectators.

planVisit: Overflow parking is available near the dome.
Sign the park waiver before visiting.
No seeds, gum, tobacco, or pets.
No outside food or drink, except allowed team cooler rules.
whyChoose: Premier sports destination in Jackson, New Jersey.
Great for tournaments, rentals, camps, showcases, and private events.
Built for teams, families, coaches, athletes, and spectators.
Food, seating, clubhouse access, viewing areas, and field amenities in one location.
